title: Kiran Tatch

{{Quote|He didn't partake in the pursuit of my team ''[…]'' I think he just enjoyed watching someone else chase some fugitives.|Lieutenant Commander Anson Blazer|<ref name="air" />}}
'''Kiran Tatch''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tunroth]] from [[Jiroch-Reslia]]. He excelled as a hunter, attaining a high level in the [[Tunroth Hunter]]s. He later took up [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] and joined the [[Granse Confederacy]], an elite team, with special animosity to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
===Tunroth Hunter===
Coming from a strong hunting culture, Tatch excelled at the discipline, qualifying as a [[Tunroth Hunter]], the most highly respected organization on his homeworld. This involved a 3 month initiation period and recognition by 3 other Hunters. Of the 27 levels, Tatch eventually attained the rank or ''[[shturlan]]'' (the twelfth level). He became a proficient archer with the traditional ''[[klirun]]'' bow, and fought against the invading [[Lortan]]s in the [[Reslian Purge]]. Despite the massive defeat that the Tunroth suffered at the hands of their technologically advanced foes, Tatch distinguished himself and was one of the few survivors of the Purge. The experience also improved his tracking and combat abilities.<ref name="air" />

Tatch soon left behind the devastation of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], with the hunt becoming the only thing that mattered to him. Tatch found employment as a [[Skip tracer/Legends|skip tracer]], chasing down individuals who tried to escape their debts to various [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] and loan sharks. Tatch was successful in every job he undertook, and soon came to work for various [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] in the [[Y'Toub system/Legends|Y'Toub system]]. From there his reputation spread, and it was even rumored that [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] considered hiring him to capture [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. While employed by the Hutts, Tatch was introduced to a fellow [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Arcuse]]. Kiran often worked with this [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]], appreciating the contrast between his quiet ways and the boastful Hutts. His disdain for them gradually grew until on a visit to [[Glorga]] the Hutt, in the [[Hollastin system/Legends|Hollastin system]], he spat on the crime lord in disgust. While lesser beings would have been executed for such an affront, Tatch was merely ordered to leave—a sign of the clout he possessed. His partner, Arcuse, left with him, and the two were soon blacklisted.<ref name="air" />

===Granse Confederacy===
While departing [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], they encountered [[Rodick Tag]], an [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] [[Braceman]] who had also taken leave of the Hutts. The three of them joined the [[Granse Confederacy]], a group of eight elite hunters established in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] by the [[Kuati/Legends|Kuati]] assassin, [[Callandri]]. The Confederacy prioritized bounties on members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], with a staggering six assaults on Rebel personnel in four months. Tatch developed a specific antagonism towards the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Tirranna]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Alton Lochner]].<ref name="air" />

This animosity was noticed by the Alliance, with [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Anson Blazer]] submitting a file on his activities. Even before joining the Confederacy, Tatch had had run-ins with Rebel operatives. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he almost got Blazer killed, when he spotted him investigating the [[Kalstan gangsters]] in the [[Xorao system/Legends|Xorao system]]. Tatch reported the Rebel presence, and instead of chasing them himself, merely enjoyed watching the ensuing mayhem.<ref name="air" />

The Alliance were especially concerned about the Confederacy's actions as one of its members, the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Lu'daal-ud]], possessed key [[Datacard/Legends|datafiles]] on the Alliance. On one occasion, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] dispatched operatives to apprehend the Gand. Tatch and the rest of the Confederacy were forced to come to his aide to frustrate the Rebel's mission. Tatch was also known to work on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and [[Draria]].<ref name="air" />

==Personality and traits==
Kiran Tatch was deeply affected by fighting in the Reslian Purge. His traumatic experiences changed him, leaving him a bitter and sullen individual. To deal with his loss, he focused entirely on the hunt, disdaining other concerns. Unlike many of his species who returned home to aid in the reconstruction, Tatch left his world behind.<ref name="air" />

Tatch remained withdrawn even after discovering companionship with Arcuse and the Confederacy. He often dined alone, choosing not to share in their revelries nor celebrate their successes. This was apparent even to outsiders, with Alliance profilers suspecting his loyalty to the Confederacy was not complete, despite his sworn oath.<ref name="air" />

At some point in his career, Tatch sustained large scarring over his right eye.<ref name="air" />

==Equipment==
As was typical of his species, Tatch preferred low technology, continuing to use his ''klirun'' bow offworld. He used [[caros arrow]]s with it, tipping them with [[talar]], a stun-substance that enabled non-lethal strikes. His one accommodation to "high" technology was an archaic [[Yctor Arms]] [[Yctor Arms black-powder pistol|black-powder pistol]]. He also commonly used [[Syntherope/Legends|syntherope]] and [[Grappling hook/Legends|grappling hooks]] in pursuit of his quarry.<ref name="air" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kiran Tatch was first mentioned in the role-playing book ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''. A later book, ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'', lists his name among possible Tunroth names.
